API Endpoint Map

This document organizes the backend into specialized modules and validates frontend coverage.

Operations & Disaster Module

Endpoint

Method(s)

Description

Frontend Consumer

/api/disasters/events

GET

List disaster events

✅ disastersApi.ts

/api/operations/snapshot

GET

Operational KPIs and layers

✅ operationsApi.ts

/api/health

GET

System health & status

✅ apiClient.ts

/api/events

GET

Event log / Sync

✅ eventsApi.ts

Specialized Search & Public Access

Endpoint

Method(s)

Description

Frontend Consumer

/api/public/incidents

GET

List public incidents

✅ PublicController.cs

/api/missing-persons

GET/POST

Missing persons registry

✅ missingPersonsApi.ts

/api/incidents

GET/POST

Incident management

✅ incidentsApi.ts

Compatibility

  • The frontend uses apiClient.ts with standardized base URL configuration.

  • .NET 10 controllers provide consistent JSON responses with Success/Failure patterns.

  • CORS is configured to AllowAnyOrigin in Program.cs for tactical flexibility.
